meaning: n.[化]碳氢化合物分裂器,氢化裂解器
examples: The isbl of this hp hydrocracker unit will start at the unit filter feed vessel and conclude at product rundowns from the fractionation and the naphtha minus section.
This provides a good basis for assessing the performance and desulfurization result of the refining catalyst and cracking catalyst of the hydrocracker as well as the service life of the catalysts.
The causes of fouling of high pressure air cooler of hydrocracker in Jinlin Petrochemical Company, s refinery were analyzed. The analysis showed that the fouling was formed from polycyclic aromatics.
